KPP Goals: DAST Gating Issues: Track total DAST security issues per team
Measurement Criteria: DAST Gating Issues: Sum of High and Medium severity issues from AppScan DAST HTML reports (source: Summary of security issues section). If a team has multiple scan projects the counts are summed. Monthly/Quarterly/Annual values use median of weekly scans in the respective period.

KPP Goals: SAST Gating Issues: Track total SAST security issues per team
Measurement Criteria: SAST Gating Issues: Sum of High and Medium severity issues from AppScan SAST HTML reports (source: Summary of security issues section). If a team has multiple scan projects the counts are summed. Monthly/Quarterly/Annual values use median of weekly scans in the respective period.

KPP Goals: SCA Gating Issues: Track total SCA security issues per team
Measurement Criteria: SCA Gating Issues: Sum of High and Medium severity issues from AppScan SCA HTML reports (source: Summary of security issues section). If a team has multiple scan projects the counts are summed. Monthly/Quarterly/Annual values use median of weekly scans in the respective period.

KPP Goals: MEND Gating Issues: Track total Mend security issues per team
Measurement Criteria: MEND Gating Issues: Sum of High and Medium severity issues from Mend PDF reports (source: Severity Distribution section). If a team has multiple scan projects the counts are summed. Monthly/Quarterly/Annual values use median of weekly scans in the respective period.

KPP Goals: Unified Security Gating Issues: Aggregate security gating exposure across all scan channels
Measurement Criteria: Unified Security Gating Issues: Sum of High and Medium severity issues from DAST, SAST, SCA and MEND gating KPIs (k301+k302+k303+k304). Aggregated at team level and assigned to individuals. Monthly/Quarterly/Annual values reflect aggregated period medians from component KPIs.

KPP Goals: Unified Security Gating Issues: Aggregate security gating exposure across all scan channels
Measurement Criteria: Equivalent KPI to k305 for Architect role. Uses the same computation and data (k301+k302+k303+k304 aggregate).

KPP Goals: Unified Security Gating Issues: Aggregate security gating exposure across all scan channels
Measurement Criteria: Equivalent KPI to k305 for Program Manager role. Uses the same computation and data (k301+k302+k303+k304 aggregate).

KPP Goals: Copilot Agent or Chat Usage: Track adoption of Copilot Agent or Chat features
Measurement Criteria: Copilot Agent or Chat Usage: Number of distinct days user leveraged either Copilot Agent or Chat in the respective period. Individual-level tracking based on user login mapping.
Measure: Days with Agent or Chat usage
